issues.detail: The skill does not handle HTTP errors, pagination, or rate limiting scenarios.
The implementation is Python-only, limiting compatibility with other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: Sync Stripe charge to QBO as paid invoice
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows OAuth and invoice creation conceptually but misses the upsert-by-query idempotency pattern, the SalesItemLineDetail line structure, and most importantly the LinkedTxn payment-to-invoice linkage; treatment follows the documented upsert_customer -> create('invoice') -> record_payment with LinkedTxn flow precisely.

scenarios.name: Monthly P&L report between two dates
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows the /reports/ProfitAndLoss endpoint exists and passes date params, but fails to parse the nested Rows.Row[].Summary.ColData report structure; treatment uses get_report with start_date/end_date and parses the exact ColData rows shape.
